title: SPARC Cat acute UroMOCA implantation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3o6pn","text":"This is a procedure for an acute wired UroMOCA implant cat experiment.  A cystotomy is performed and an active, wired  (for power) UroMOCA is placed in the bladder.  The bladder is sutured closed, and urodynamics is performed to collect wireless data from the UroMOCA.  This protocol includes basic surgery, UroMOCA implantation, urodynamics and imaging.  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"b00k6","text":"1 week before start of experiment - Confirm absence of bladder spasm; healthy cat","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"58hec","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6rp68","text":"12 hours before experiment, start fasting the cat","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cmajs","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"77vvd","text":"You must transport the animal chart along with the cat to surgery site.  The veterinary  team will record all relevant data in the chart.  The chart must then go back to the housing site.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

Male or female. 6-24 months; 3.5-5.0kg ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b3jsf","text":"Syringe Pump - Genie Touch; Kent Scientific ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4fh1p","text":"Pressure Transducer - Catalog # 503067","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e7rmj","text":"WPI Amplifier - 4 channel transbridge","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2efu6","text":"WPI National Instruments multifunction I/O device - NI USB 6259 ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7f9cr","text":"National Instruments Laptop with Labview software ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dt81n","text":"Tubing - Masterflex L/S Platinum-Cured Silicone Tubing  ID 3/16 \"; Cole Parmer ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1230n","text":"BNC cables ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bl7ag","text":"Tubing to catheter - APIS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"579du","text":"Laborie Catheter - Argyl Suction Catheter, 3.5 Fr Catalog # 8890703211","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3icbq","text":"Covidien Sutures - 4-0 Vicryl Polysorb (Covidien UL212)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4vdiu","text":"3-0 Prolene (Ethicon 8762)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a1jis","text":"2-0 Silk Syringe","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"da39d","text":"60ml Contrast","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"jp4u","text":"Visipaque 320mg/ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f9oog","text":"Receiving radio/antenna","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ebauh","text":"Surgilube ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"54n93","text":"Surgical instruments","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Transport cat from housing site to surgery site.
Animal is anesthetized and abdomen is shaved by the vet team. The cat is then moved into the surgery room and attached to monitors by the vet team.
Drape animal and perform betadine scrub on abdomen and genitals.
Put surgilube on 3.5Fr catheter and insert into bladder through the urethra. Advance the catheter until resistance is met, then pull back 2-3cm.

Use gentle suction with syringe to withdraw urine from bladder through the catheter. Measure the volume and save the urine for urinalysis. 7 mL urine removed Conductivity of urine was recorded before sending for urinalysis 40.78 mS/cm 41.54 mS/cm 41.52 mS/cm
Use 1:10 dilution of contrast to saline to visualize bladder. Fill the bladder with contrast and take a 3D CT image Add 10 mL more to bladder take 3D CT image
Empty Bladder ~13.5ml

Performed after cat is transferred from Isoflurane to propofol anesthetic. Fill rate is 2ml saline/minute using syringe pump. Data is recorded using Labview software. Pressure is recorded using an external pressure transducer connected to syringe pump on one end and tubing that leads to the catheter on the other end.
Fill bladder with saline and record pressure using pressure transducer connected to LabView Fill to 15 mL
Empty Bladder Remove 17 ml of saline + urine
See protocol titled "SPARC Cat surgery Day 0" for details on accessing and opening the bladder for device insertion.
1 cm incision made in bladder. Place device in bladder, with the wires for power remaining outside the bladder. Suture the bladder closed, check for leaks and place bladder back into body.
Close the abdomen, with the wires for power remaing outside of the animal

Fill bladder with saline at 2ml/minand record pressure using pressure transducer connected to LabView Fill to 12 mL ; No spontaneous contractions seen Fill to 15 mL ; Pressure response from UroMOCA is seen
Empty Bladder
Cleveland Clinic animal team euthanizes the animal

Fill bladder with saline and record pressure using pressure transducer connected to LabView Fill to 12 mL ; Non-voiding contraction seen Fill to 13 mL ; Non-voiding contraction seen Fill to 16 mL ; Non-voiding contraction seen
Test for device function. Data is being sent wirelessly from the UroMOCA to the receiving radio
Infuse 10mL of contrast (1:10 dilution) – Single CT image Infuse an additional 5mL of contrast (1:10 dilution) – Single CT image
Empty Bladder
Fill bladder with saline at 2ml/minand record pressure using pressure transducer connected to LabView Fill to 15 mL ; Tug on catheter - large contraction
Empty bladder 15ml removed
Infuse 0.9% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data
Empty bladder
Infuse 1.5% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data
Empty Bladder
Infuse 3.0% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data
Empty Bladder
Infuse 1.5% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data
Empty bladder
Infuse 1.5% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data
Empty bladder
Infuse 3.0% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data
Empty Bladder
Infuse 0.9% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data
Empty Bladder
Infuse 3.0% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data
Empty Bladder
Rotate animal on right side Infuse 0.9% saline in boluses of 3mL, 6mL, 9mL, 12mL, 15mL at a rate of 10mL / minutes. UroMOCA transmitting data
Bladder is removed and placed in formalin for histological analysis
creator: Brett Hanzlicek
